mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_note_converted (note_id, title, tags_json, create_time_str, toc_html, body_html, convert_time) VALUES (#{noteId}, #{title}, #{tagsJson}, #{createTimeStr}, #{tocHtml}, #{bodyHtml}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), tags_json = VALUES(tags_json), create_time_str = VALUES(create_time_str), toc_html = VALUES(toc_html), body_html = VALUES(body_html), convert_time = NOW()
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM biz_note_converted WHERE note_id IN
#{noteId}
